name: insurance-claim-packet
description: Property insurance claim submission packet containing the claim form, supporting bank statement, and related invoice for repair services.

shared_context.claimant_name: Full legal name of the person filing the claim
shared_context.claimant_address: Street address of the claimant / insured property
shared_context.claim_amount_range: Approximate total claim value for consistency across documents

shared_context_hint: All documents relate to the same insurance claim. The bank statement should show the claimant's account. The invoices are for repair/replacement services related to the claimed loss.
